content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：徐EP·不梦乡志异 已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

**忘却前夜OST：徐EP·不梦乡志异**
让妾身想想， 今天的故事，要说什么呢……
啊，妾身知道了，给小小姐和小先生们的故事应该是~
夜半莫讲亏心错，三更冤魂上房梁。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
企划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "Xu EP: Strange Tales from the Dreamless Land" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST: Xu EP: Strange Tales from the Dreamless Land**
Let me think... what story shall I spin for you today?
Ah, I have it. A tale for the little lords and ladies...
"Recount no crime at midnight’s chime, lest the souls you wronged begin their climb."

Project: B.I.A.V. Studio
Composer: F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
